# Sagewai

> Sagewai is the open-source autonomous agent platform for senior engineers shipping AI features under budget. Bootstrap with Claude or GPT, capture training data with the Curator, fine-tune a local model in a weekend, deploy via Ollama. Never pay per-token at the limit.

The platform is the audience-pin filter: a senior engineer at a 50-500 person SaaS, told to add AI this quarter, with a budget measured in hundreds of dollars per month. We are not for AI researchers, vibes-based founders, or FAANG ML platform teams. We are for the person whose CFO checks the AWS bill.

## Five pillars, one spine

- **SDK** — Python-native agent runtime. Any LLM via LiteLLM (100+ models). MCP tools, typed memory, guardrails, multi-step workflows. https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/core-concepts/agents
- **Autopilot** — Describe the goal in plain English. We design the agents, run the mission, heal on failure. https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/autopilot
- **Fleet** — Distributed workers, capability-based dispatch, project isolation, isolated execution sandboxes. https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/guides/fleet-architecture
- **Observatory** — OpenTelemetry, VictoriaMetrics, Grafana dashboards, the Iron Man HUD. Answer "what did AI cost us?" in one click. https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/observatory
- **Training Loop** — Curate production runs, fine-tune local models, deploy via Ollama. Cost-down to zero per token. https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/guides/training

The spine is **Sealed** — defense-in-depth security across all five pillars. Per-CLI workload identity, externalised secret backends, JIT credentials, redaction at the RPC boundary, replay safety, per-CLI ACL. https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/security

## Quickstart

- 5-minute install + first agent: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/getting-started
- Minimal setup (no sandbox required): https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/getting-started/minimal-setup
- Build your first agent: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/guides/first-agent
- Architecture overview: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/architecture

## Lighthouse use cases

These are the production-grade walkthroughs — each ships with a comprehensive README, real-world framing, and a runnable demo.

- Customer support triage agent in 400 lines: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/core-concepts/agents
- Train your own model in a weekend, $0 to $5: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/guides/training
- Show your CFO where the AI money goes: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/observatory
- Multi-tenant production with isolated tenants: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/guides/fleet-enterprise
- Long-context conversations on 7B local LLMs: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/core-concepts/memory
- Graph memory beats vector retrieval for multi-hop: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/core-concepts/memory
- Production credential isolation, sandbox + Sealed: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/guides/sealed-vault

## Architecture

The platform is a control plane plus a worker fleet. The control plane plans, persists, and dispatches; the fleet executes. Every workflow run flows through this split.

- Architecture overview: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/architecture
- Runtime topology: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/architecture/runtime-topology
- Security tiers (Tier-1, Tier-2, Tier-3): https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/architecture/security-tiers
- Execution modes (Mode 0–3): https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/architecture/execution-modes
- Sandbox backends (Docker, Podman, Kubernetes, AgentCore): https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/architecture/sandbox-backends

## Inference cost-down spectrum

Sagewai's positioning is the **inference spectrum** — the cost-down arc from cloud LLMs to your own local model.

- Local inference overview (Ollama, vLLM, LM Studio): https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/guides/local-inference
- Training & fine-tuning: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/guides/training
- Cost management: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/guides/cost-management
- LiteLLM integration: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/guides/litellm-integration
- Hardware requirements: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/guides/hardware-requirements

## Comparisons

- Sagewai vs LangChain vs LlamaIndex: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/guides/vs-alternatives
- Sagewai vs MiniMax Agent: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/guides/vs-minimax

## Claim disambiguation

- "Sagewai is open source" — AGPL-3.0-or-later. Commercial dual-license available. Source: https://github.com/sagewai/platform
- "Any LLM" — 100+ models via LiteLLM (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Mistral, Cohere, Meta Llama, DeepSeek, Together, Groq, Fireworks, Azure OpenAI, AWS Bedrock, Vertex AI, plus local Ollama + LM Studio).
- "Cost-down to zero per token" — refers to fine-tuned local inference via Ollama after training-loop capture. Initial Q1 deployments run on cloud LLMs; training loop walks Q3-Q4 customers to local.
- "Production-ready" — full Sealed security spine (workload identity, JIT secrets, redaction), OpenTelemetry instrumentation, project-scoped multi-tenancy, audit trail, and per-mission credentials.
- "Autopilot" — Sagewai's describe-the-goal feature uses a hosted blueprint service (proprietary). The platform also runs without it; manual mode never disappears.
- "Iron Man HUD" — internal name for the live operator dashboard at /hud-ironman. Reads from the same OTel telemetry as the Grafana board.
